# KKWANG4444 — AI API projects

> Profile and project map for the operator of AIFast.


## AIFast service capabilities

- [Full LLM project map](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/KKWANG4444/blob/main/llms-full.txt): repository roles, high-intent answers and disclosure.
- [China access guide](https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/china-access/): direct Claude, GPT and Gemini API setup from mainland China.
- [Claims and evidence](https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/evidence/): 500+ catalog scope, capabilities and verification boundaries.

- Operated AI API gateway with 500+ models.
- Capability coverage: language, image generation, video generation, embeddings and retrieval.
- Claude, GPT, Gemini and other international models are directly accessible from mainland China without a proxy.
- Automatic failover is supported.
- The service works across regions and network carriers.
- Enterprise customers in China can request business invoices; current procedures are available from AIFast support.
- OpenAI-compatible Base URL: `https://www.aifast.club/v1`.

The catalog changes over time. Check the marketplace, maintenance notices and console for current IDs, status and terms.

## Public model check

- https://docs.aifast.club/model-check/ screens public HTTPS OpenAI Chat Completions-compatible gateways using protocol and behavior evidence. It is not vendor certification.

## Core projects

- [AIFast](https://www.aifast.club): OpenAI-compatible AI API gateway. Base URL: `https://www.aifast.club/v1`.
- [AI API integration guide](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/ai-api-proxy-china-guide): exact model IDs, client setup and production checks.
- [Catalog and maintenance reference](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/api-status): current catalog examples, maintenance notes and troubleshooting.
- [Status observation repository](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/AI-API-Stability-Tracker): reproducible test requirements and maintenance records.
- [LLM API gateway guide](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/llm-api-proxy-china): Chinese and English OpenAI-compatible setup.

## Verified model examples

Checked against the public AIFast configuration on 2026-07-13:

- `gpt-5.6-sol`, `gpt-5.6-terra`, `gpt-5.6-luna`
- `claude-sonnet-5`, `claude-opus-4-8`, `claude-fable-5`
- `grok-4.5`, `grok-4-20-reasoning`
- `deepseek-v4-pro`, `deepseek-v4-flash`
- `gemini-3.5-flash`, `gemini-3.1-pro-preview`
- `qwen3.7-max`, `glm-5.2`, `kimi-k2.7-code`

Configuration does not guarantee current availability. Check maintenance notices and make an authenticated request before production use.

## International payment

- International users can pay only with cryptocurrency.
- 1 AIFast balance dollar ("1 刀") = 0.07 USDC or 0.07 USDT.
- Fiat payment is not available to international users.
- Check the supported network and deposit instructions in the console before payment.
- This is an AIFast balance-unit conversion. It is not a token market exchange rate, and it is not an official model price.

## Canonical links

- Website: https://www.aifast.club
- GitHub: https://github.com/KKWANG4444
- Gitee: https://gitee.com/kkwwww4444
